text:
Meridian Robotics — Leadership

Our executive team brings decades of experience in industrial automation.

Elena Voss — Chief People Officer
Elena joined Meridian in 2024 after a decade scaling HR at pan-European manufacturers. She recently spoke at the Future of Work Summit on retaining frontline robotics technicians.

Marcus Webb, Chief Financial Officer
Marcus oversees finance, procurement and facilities across our EMEA sites.

Divya Krishnan - IT Director
Divya leads enterprise systems, security and integrations.

Jonas Feld — Principal Robotics Engineer
Jonas heads the manipulator control group.

Press enquiries: press@meridianrobotics.com. General: info@meridianrobotics.com.
Direct: elena.voss@meridianrobotics.com | marcus.webb@meridianrobotics.com

Careers at Meridian Robotics

We're hiring! 34 open roles across Munich, Rotterdam and Lyon — including 12 new positions on our field-service team opened this quarter.

Our people operations run on TriNet today as we scale past 300 employees across three countries.

See our LinkedIn page: https://www.linkedin.com/company/meridian-robotics. Elena Voss shares hiring updates at https://www.linkedin.com/in/elena-voss-people.
